title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Big Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
